title: Cloudflare Analyst Ratings and Price Targets
text: Among 35 analysts covering Cloudflare (NET), consensus sentiment remains constructive despite recent volatility. Current breakdown shows 22 analysts rating the stock Buy or Strong Buy, 11 rating it Hold, and 2 rating it Sell or Strong Sell. The average price target stands at $236.68, suggesting approximately 12% upside from current levels around $210. BTIG raised their price target to $199 on February 4, 2026, maintaining a Buy rating. Piper Sandler raised their price target to $250 from $222, reflecting confidence in the company's AI infrastructure opportunities. Susquehanna analyst Shyam Patil raised his price target on Cloudflare to $200 from $190 while maintaining a Neutral rating. DZ Bank downgraded Cloudflare on July 22, 2025, citing valuation concerns. Stifel lowered their price target to $260 from $275, suggesting some tempering of near-term enthusiasm. Firms like Robert W. Baird and Piper Sandler remain positive on AI infrastructure opportunities and enterprise market-share gains. Cantor Fitzgerald expresses caution regarding current valuation multiples. The consensus rating of Moderate Buy reflects balanced sentiment, with the analyst community acknowledging both significant growth potential and valuation risks at current stock prices.
